channel.title: Lazytype Blog
channel.description: Plain, practical writing on voice dictation, dictation apps and productivity.

item.title: The 7 Best Wispr Flow Alternatives in 2026
item.description: Honest picks across price, privacy and platforms, including one-time and offline options.

item.title: How to Dictate Text in Any App on Windows
item.description: Three ways to turn speech into text on Windows, from built-in to hold-a-key.

item.title: Voice to Text Without a Subscription
item.description: Free and one-time options so you never pay monthly for voice typing.

item.title: Lazytype vs Wispr Flow
item.description: Honest side-by-side on price, platforms, privacy and offline support.

item.title: Lazytype vs Superwhisper
item.description: Which dictation app wins for Windows and macOS users in 2026?

item.title: Best Dictation App for Mac
item.description: Top picks for macOS dictation including offline and one-time options.

item.title: The 7 Best AI Dictation Apps in 2026
item.description: A practical comparison of AI-powered dictation apps in 2026.

item.title: Voice Typing vs Keyboard: Which Is Actually Faster?
item.description: The real numbers behind speaking at 130 wpm vs typing at 40 wpm.

item.title: Best Dictation Software for Writers in 2026
item.description: Top voice-to-text tools for fiction writers, journalists, and non-fiction authors.

item.title: How to Speak in One Language and Type in Another
item.description: Real-time speech translation for multilingual workflows.

item.title: Lazytype vs BossAI: Which Windows Dictation App Wins?
item.description: Honest head-to-head on price, offline, privacy and accuracy.

item.title: How to Use Voice to Text Fully Offline on Windows
item.description: Dictate without internet using Lazytype's on-device Whisper engine.
